Module com.example.ventana
Package com.example.ventana.controller

Class TestController

java.lang.Object
com.example.ventana.controller.TestController
public class TestController extends Object
Main controller for the test game view.

This class manages the interaction between the JavaFX UI (FXML) and the GameLogic class. Responsibilities include:

  • Displaying the current word to guess.
  • Validating user input.
  • Controlling the countdown timer with a progress bar.
  • Updating messages and level information on the UI.

Version:
2.0
Author:
Nerie
